title: What to Expect From BlackBerry's Q3 2023 Earnings
text: BlackBerry was scheduled to announce Q3 earnings results on December 20, after market close. The consensus EPS Estimate was -$0.07 and the consensus Revenue Estimate was $166.78 million, down 9.4% year-over-year. The Canadian software company posted Q2 results that topped expectations, although cybersecurity revenue fell by 8% year-over-year. BlackBerry secured clearance from a NATO agency for global use of its security suite in official secure communications and was selected to provide acoustic solutions for Great Wall Motors next-generation vehicles, while also expanding its global footprint of BlackBerry SecuSUITE partners in Asia Pacific. Over the last 2 years, BB had beaten EPS estimates 88% of the time and had beaten revenue estimates 63% of the time.
